items.title: Review and listening
items.body:
Final practice for this workbook lesson. Listen, repeat, and review vocabulary.

Examples:
• I have I understand
• I have a cat I understand Spanish
• You have a dog You understand German
• I have a bicycle I understand only Chinese
• You have a table You understand French

items.text: I have to study I want to understand
You have to sleep I you want to understand Engl ish.
I have to work I have to understand Chinese
You have to eat You have to understand your hu sband

items.prompt: Review: put the sentence in order.
Review: put the sentence in order.
items.answer: I have a cat I understand Spanish

items.prompt: Review: put the sentence in order.
items.answer: You have a dog You understand German
